feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business Application Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Business Application Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Connection from SAP Build to Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We need SAP help guide to establish a connection from SAP Build to Datashpere

entry.title: Inquiry on SAP Build Code Licensing Models and Availability
entry.content:
Hi experts!
 
I hope you are doing well…
 
We would like to extend an inquire about the available licensing models for SAP Build Code.
 
SAP Build Code is an integrated development environment (IDE), similar to SAP Business Application Studio, that includes embedded artificial intelligence capabilities and tools (e.g., Joule for Developers). When reviewing the SAP Pricing App, we were unable to identify a SKU associated with this tool under a subscription-based licensing model. Therefore, we understand that this service may only be available under alternative licensing models (e.g., CPEA or Pay-As-You-Go). We would appreciate your confirmation on this matter, as we are currently working on an initiative with a client who plans to acquire development capabilities through a subscription model; however, when creating the opportunity or building the Bill of Materials, the Build Code service does not appear as an available option under this scheme.
 
Additionally, we would like to confirm the following: if a client wants to develop a Fiori/CAP application using Joule for Developers, is it necessary to do so through SAP Build Code? And if so, would this service only be available under the CPEA model?
 
We look forward to your response and would appreciate any documentation or resources you can share to further clarify this topic.
 
¡Kind regards! 
 
SAP Build Code SAP Business Application Studio Joule

entry.title: How to clear update status failed
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Last time we tried to update subscription plan. But it is getting failed. If we would like to stay in current plan, How to clear message of failed status in BTP.

Thank You

entry.title: Audio output inconsistent across devices in browser-based web app – how to handle?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m working on a browser-based feature that plays sound (different frequencies) as part of a web app, and I’m noticing inconsistent results across devices.

On some mobile devices, the sound output is strong and clear, but on others it feels weaker or doesn’t behave as expected—even though the same code is used. Desktop browsers seem more stable compared to mobile.

I’m trying to understand what could be causing this difference. Could it be related to:

  • Browser audio engine differences
  • Device speaker limitations
  • OS-level sound processing
  • Autoplay or permission restrictions

Has anyone faced similar behavior while working with web apps (e.g., in SAP Business Application Studio or UI5)? Any best practices to make audio handling more consistent across devices?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Not able to create custom branded client with SSAM 2511 metadata.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to build a custom branded client with 2511 metadata. But, I'm facing an issue while creating the client.

"BUILD FAILED in 28s
Failed to build plugin @nativescript-community/ui-material-core :
Error: Command gradlew.bat failed with exit code 1."

Could you please help me in resolving the issue.

Metadata version - ASSETMGRMD251100P_1-70008962.

SSAM version - 2511.

Below attaching the screenshot for your reference.

Thanks,

Battula Sushma.

entry.title: Business Application Studio Overrides fail in package.json when package name starts '@'
entry.content:
Hi

When I run npm install I have the following vulnerability appearing

ip-address <=10.1.0
Severity: moderate
ip-address has XSS in Address6 HTML-emitting methods - https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-v2v4-37r5-5v8g
fix available via `npm audit fix`
node_modules/@ui5/cli/node_modules/ip-address

When I apply the override as follows

"@ui5": {
             "cli": {
                      "ip-address": "10.2.0"
                      }
               }

I get the following error

npm error code EINVALIDTAGNAME
npm error Invalid tag name "@ui5" of package "@ui5": Tags may not have any characters that encodeURIComponent encodes.

If I adjust the override by removing the '@'

"ui5": {
             "cli": {
                      "ip-address": "10.2.0"
                      }
               }

When I run npm install, I don't get any errors but the vulnerability remains in place

Is there a way to resolve this

Thanks

Arden

entry.title: How to properly logout from a CAP mocked authentication?
entry.content:
Given a CAP application using mocked authentication

"cds": {
    "requires": {
      "[mocked]": {
        "auth": {
          "kind": "mocked",
          "users": {
            "adm": {
              "password": "1234",
              "roles": [
                "admin"
              ]
            },
            "user": {
              "password": "1234",
              "roles": [
                "readonly"
              ]
            }
          }
        },

 When I run the service locally, the popup requesting user + password is displayed. However, it is "never" requested again and there isn't any obvious way for "logout" from the mocked user. Even if I kill the app and re-run 'cds serve' or 'cds watch', the latest authentication is somehow reused.

I checked in DevTools the session and local storage and there is nothing. 

There is cookie that is generated, but if I delete it, it not only kills the session but also the BAS session (kinda I am forced to reload BAS). After BAS is reloaded (just a refresh on the page, no need to restart the dev space) and then rerun the service, the popup is displayed again and I am able to test with a different user.

Conclusion: somehow the authentication is linked with the BAS session, which clearly is not ideal. 

How to properly logout from a CAP mocked authentication without having to kill the browser cookies?

entry.title: Simplified Git has disappeared
entry.content:
Our BAS shows no Simplified Git:

It still appears on this help: https://help.sap.com/docs/bas/sap-business-application-studio/git-source-control?locale=en-US&version=LATEST
This inconvenience occurs all subaccounts and our developers.
Maybe some degrade of BAS?
Version: 1.109.5
Commit: c0ab3949af95bdfba169e0d006f70cdff7519d13
Date: 2026-05-07T16:40:47.557Z
Browser: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/148.0.0.0 Safari/537.36 Edg/148.0.0.0

entry.title: SAP Business Application studio for Github copilot does not Enterprise login option
entry.content: Hi Team, how can we login with GHE in SAP BAS  with Github copilot new  chat feature option.

entry.title: Can't access external services from BAS project on BTP Trial system
entry.content:
Hello all,

I've created a full stack dev space within BAS running from BTP Trial account. I created a project and want to access APIs on the Business Accelerator Hub.

My subscriptions are as follows :

and I believe my user has all the necessary admin roles in my BTP Trial subaccount :

When I go to my story board in the BAS and add an external resource , I don't see any *package* apart from "SAP Subscription Billing" (I expected to see an option for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public Edition).

If I run CF target in my terminal, I'm connected to a valid Cloud Foundry target

Can anyone tell me what might be missing in my setup/config ? Any help greatly appreciated.

Regards,

Gabriel

entry.title: How do upgrade SAP Business Apllication Studio Plan from free to standard
entry.content: How do upgrade SAP Business Apllication Studio Plan from free to standard , please do the needfull asap. othrwise our system will completly down , a vitul application nedd to be develop.

entry.title: Build Process Automation navigating SAP GUI to Excel
entry.content: I'm currently working on a project in BPA where we are automating the process of downloading income statements from multiple profit centers in SAP, compiling them in a single excel file as sheets, and then uploading them to a folder in a SharePoint. Currently I've set it up so that the bot navigates the SAP GUI u, inputs the report group, and will fill out the information for one profit center. I changed environment settings so the output is a Microsoft Excel 2007 since I was getting internal macro errors with just Microsoft Excel. The report runs and opens in excel, but from there is where we are having trouble. I've tried capturing excel using the BPA capture tool, and also adding it as an application, but when I ran the "Get Open Notebooks" activity it still wouldn't recognize the open excel workbook.  Any pointers on how I should go about this? We've also tried downloading the files directly, but that messes with the formatting and they become messy when opening as an excel that way. I've tried finding videos on connecting excel with BPA, but most of the content out there focuses on opening new excel workbooks and doesn't have much on how to connect to existing ones that SAP GUI opens. Any help on the best way to build this pipeline would be much appreciated. Thank you.

entry.title: ODATA services not found in BTP cockpit
entry.content:
Hello, i am connecting my on premises system to BAS.
1. Cloud connector setup is done and connection is fine between cloud connector and On premises system . on checking connection it says - "Backend is reachable from cloud connector".

2. Configures on premises system from BAS, entered all the variables like WebIDEUsage, WebIDEEnabled, HTML5.DynamicDestination, HTML5.Timeout

3. Getting below error when opening ON premises system from BAS - "

Could not get v2 and v4 services."
4. /IWFND/CONFIG is published in /n/IWFND/V4_ADMIN
5. Tcode- /n /IWFND/ERROR_LOG is showing error - Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered
6. While accessing url - https:///sap/opu/odata4/iwfnd/config/default/iwfnd/catalog/0002/ServiceGroups?$expand=DefaultSystem(...
getting error 
"Service '/IWFND/CATALOG' version '0002' repository 'DEFAULT' not registered",

but as i mentioned /IWFND/CONFIG is already registered.

So, help me in setting up connection between BAS and On premises ERP

entry.title: Cloud ALM Custom application Crash
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We recently integrated a custom SAP BTP application into SAP Cloud ALM. Our requirement is to receive email alerts whenever the custom application crashes. According to SAP documentation, we need to use the Alert Notification Service. Could you clarify whether this Alert Notification Service should be subscribed to in the SAP Cloud ALM subaccount or in the subaccount where the custom application is running?"

https://support.sap.com/en/alm/sap-cloud-alm/operations/expert-portal/health-monitoring/health-monitoring-setup-configuration/health-monitoring-for-sap-btp-cf.html

Note: Custom application and Cloud ALM is running in different subaccounts.

 

Regards,

MK

entry.title: Getting 403 error while accessing the On Prem resource though exposed to BTP through cloud connector
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am new to developing application with BTP BAS and cloud connector and recently i was working a React Application (Front-End) which connects to a node js Server (Back-End) that in turn uses Connectivity and Destination service to connect to my On Prem system and fetch data.

 

 

 

I am not using a SAP system as a On Prem rather i am exposing a particular port of linux OS. On this Port, an application is running where it will fetch monitoring data (CPU metrics, OS process etc) and give the response.

 

 

When i ran the backend in BAS (nodemon index.js) and try to access this resource, the response is fine. There is no issue. But while accessing the data in Frontend (which in turn call Backend) to fetch the data, i am getting 403.

From backend

 

From Frontend

 

 

Console log from backend while accessing the resource using Front-End

 

Cloud Connector Trace

 

Summary:

Application Backend -> Cloud Connector -> On Prem Resource is working but Application Frontend -> Application Backend -> Cloud Connector -> On Prem is not working. 

I am using Trial BTP account. Could you please guide / advise me here on what am i doing wrong ?

entry.title: Getting 403 error while accessing the On Prem resource though exposed to BTP through cloud connector
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

I am new to developing application with BTP BAS and cloud connector and recently i was working a React Application (Front-End) which connects to a node js Server (Back-End) that in turn uses Connectivity and Destination service to connect to my On Prem system and fetch data.

 

I am not using a SAP system as a On Prem rather i am exposing a particular port of linux OS. On this Port, an application is running where it will fetch monitoring data (CPU metrics, OS process etc) and give the response.

 

 

When i ran the backend in BAS (nodemon index.js) and try to access this resource, the response is fine. There is no issue. But while accessing the data in Frontend (which in turn call Backend) to fetch the data, i am getting 403.

From backend

 

From Frontend

 

 

Console log from backend while accessing the resource using Front-End

 

Cloud Connector Trace

 

Summary:

Application Backend -> Cloud Connector -> On Prem Resource is working but Application Frontend -> Application Backend -> Cloud Connector -> On Prem is not working. 

I am using Trial BTP account. Could you please guide / advise me here on what am i doing wrong ?

entry.title: Query SalesPriceList result not the same behavior in Custom BO and Before Save
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have a script where I am calling the SalesPriceList Query in custom BO and before save of customer contract

here is the sample code below

var initQuery = SalesPriceList.QueryByGroupCode;
var initSelParams = initQuery.CreateSelectionParams();
initSelParams.Add(initQuery.GroupCode.content, "I", "EQ", "PLPRICE1");
var initQueryResult = initQuery.ExecuteDataOnly(initSelParams);

var query = SalesPriceList.QueryByTypeCodeAndPropertyIDAndPropertyValue;
var selParams = query.CreateSelectionParams();

// Filter by TypeCode for Base Price List
selParams.Add(query.TypeCode.content, "I", "EQ", "7PL0");

selParams.Add(query.ValidityPeriod.StartTimePoint.Date, "I", "GE", currentDate);
selParams.Add(query.ValidityPeriod.EndTimePoint.Date, "I", "LE", currentDate);

var queryPriceList_Results = query.Execute(selParams);

if (queryPriceList_Results.Count() > 0) {
foreach (var pricing in queryPriceList_Results) {
var pricelist = pricing.PriceSpecification;

--the rest of the logic

}

}

The problem is in my custom BO the PriceSpecification is returning a value. But in before save it is blank.

Can you help me what is the reason why it is not working eve nif the code is the same?

 

Regards,

Carlo

entry.title: Terminated Employee Appearing in Employee Search in PP2
entry.content: In the pp2 budget workbook, terminated employees are appearing in the employee search results. During our testing, we searched for employee  who is a terminated employee, and the employee was returned in the search results.

entry.title: iOS Simulator crashes with reference error in sap service and asset manager application v2405.
entry.content:
We are trying to run iOS simulator for SAP SSAM 2405 branded client but it's getting crashed with below error:

---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Restarting application on device D8F8AA9C-4A4B-4783-AECF-938F971D6FC3...

  ***** Fatal JavaScript exception - application has been terminated. *****

  NativeScript encountered a fatal error:

  Error calling module function

  Error calling module function

  ReferenceError: UIContentSizeCategorySmall is not defined

  File: (file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/webpack/bootstrap:27:0)

  StackTrace:

  ./node_modules/@nativescript/core/accessibility/font-scale.ios.js(file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/node_modules/@nativescript/core/accessibility/font-scale.ios.js:30:0)

  at __webpack_require__(file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/webpack/bootstrap:24:0)

  at fn(file: app/webpack:/qdfssam2405/webpack/runtime/hot module replacement:61:0)

  at ./node_modules/@nativescript/core/accessibility/accessibi

entry.title: Assistance Required for Debugging Cloud Build APK
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We have built a custom client using Cloud Build. Could you please guide us on how to perform debugging using the Cloud Build APK?

Your assistance would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you.
